zh.Sandy, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Langley於1548年9月15日出生在英國貝德福爾桑迪時，他的父親Edward Langley26歲，母親Ann Milton Brydges23歲。他於大約1572年與Ann Denison在英國貝德福爾桑迪結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1600年7月12日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾桑迪。

zh-hans.Sandy, Bedfordshire, England: 英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Langley于1548年9月15日出生在英国貝德福爾桑迪时，他的父亲Edward Langley26岁，母亲Ann Milton Brydges23岁。他于大约1572年与Ann Denison在英国貝德福爾桑迪结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1600年7月12日在英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾桑迪。

nameMeanings.name: Langley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Langley was born on 15 September 1548, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Edward Langley, was 26 and his mother, Ann Milton Brydges, was 23. He married Ann Denison about 1572, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 12 July 1600, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Langley est né le 15 septembre 1548, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Langley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ann Milton Brydges, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ann Denison environ 1572, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1600, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Langley am 15. September 1548 in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Langley 26 und seine Mutter Ann Milton Brydges 23. Er hat um 1572 in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England Ann Denison geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juli 1600 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Langley è nato il il 15 settembre 1548 nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Edward Langley, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ann Milton Brydges, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ann Denison circa 1572, nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 luglio 1600, nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Sandy, Bedfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディ
ja.Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Langleyが1548年9月15日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディで生まれた時，父Edward Langleyは26歳，母Ann Milton Brydgesは23歳であった。約1572年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディでAnn Denisonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1600年7月12日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Langley(이)가 1548년 9월 15일 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Langley(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Milton Brydges(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1572년 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 Ann Denison(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1600년 7월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 샌디에 묻혔다.

pt.15 Sep 1548–12 July 1600: 15 de setembro de 1548–12 de julho de 1600
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Langley nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1548, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Langley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ann Milton Brydges, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Denison aproximadamente 1572, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1600, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Langley родился 15 сентября 1548 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Langley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Milton Brydges, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Denison около 1572 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 12 июля 1600 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.15 Sep 1548–12 July 1600: 15 de septiembre de 1548–12 de julio de 1600
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Langley nació el 15 de septiembre de 1548, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Langley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ann Milton Brydges, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ann Denison aproximadamente 1572, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1600, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
